title: India Climate Week 2026
description: India Climate Week is the premier annual gathering of climate leaders, policymakers, developers, and researchers. Organized by CMAI, the 2026 edition focuses on the implementation of CCTS, Article 6 transfers, and scaling hard-tech carbon removals.
agenda: Day 1: India's CCTS Compliance Path and Target Allocation
Day 2: Financing Transition: Voluntary Carbon Markets and Article 6
Day 3: Deep Tech Carbon Removals: Biochar, ERW, and Direct Air Capture
Day 4: Soil Sequestration, Regenerative Agriculture and Green Credits
Day 5: Youth Climate Action, Startup Pitch Competition, and Closing Plenary
speakers: Shri R. K. Singh (Honorable Minister, Ministry of Power)*
Dr. J. R. Sharma (Member Secretary, NITI Aayog)*
Ms. Sunita Roy (Director, Carbon Removal India Alliance)

title: National Roundtable: Scaling High-Permanence Carbon Removal in India
description: Jointly hosted by CRIA and CMAI, this high-level roundtable brings together scientists, industry buyers, and regulatory bodies to outline a certification framework for high-permanence CDR methods (Biochar, ERW) under the Green Credit Programme.
agenda: 10:00 AM - Welcome and Introduction: The CDR Imperative
11:00 AM - Panel 1: Basalt and Biomass: Science of Indian Solutions
01:30 PM - Panel 2: Integrity and Monitoring, Reporting, Verification (MRV)
03:00 PM - Panel 3: Aligning Voluntary Markets with Article 6.2
speakers: Dr. A. K. Sen (Principal Investigator, Deccan Basalt Project)
Mr. Rajeev Gowda (Advisor, Ministry of Environment, Forest & Climate Change)

title: Capacity Building Webinar: CCTS Readiness for Obligated Entities
description: An interactive webinar designed for compliance officers and sustainability managers in the cement, power, and iron & steel sectors. We break down calculation methodologies, baseline verifications, and trade execution strategies.
agenda: 03:00 PM - Overview of the CCTS Rules & Timelines
04:15 PM - Q&A with Policy & Technical Experts
speakers: Mr. S. K. Gupta (Lead Auditor, Carbon Verification Services)
